allow: Bash(python -X utf8 -c "import urllib.request, json; r=urllib.request.urlopen\('http://localhost:8000/api/aqi'\); print\(json.dumps\(json.loads\(r.read\(\)\), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
